title: Critical SQLi — Financial Sector
description: Discovered and reported a blind SQL injection vulnerability in a financial sector web application. Classified as P1/Critical severity. Bounty awarded.

title: C2-over-DNS Research Paper
description: Conducted research on command-and-control communication over DNS tunneling. Documented evasion techniques and detection strategies.

title: Founded Student CTF Team — University of Jordan
description: Established and now lead the university's first competitive CTF team, organizing weekly training sessions and internal competitions.
